rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual editorial that narratively reviews decades of mitigation-related JMR work, so this 2007 JMR article could be included as part of that historical framing rather than deeply engaged. At the same time, the cited paper directly studies a consumer-harm mechanism (calorie underestimation) and a mitigation intervention (piecemeal estimation), which is topically aligned with the mitigation lens. Because the matched evidence is only a DOI record with no in-text citation context, the pair cannot be safely dropped but is not clearly a strong-use citation from current evidence.
